title: Imagine
why_this_song: The imperative 'Imagine' repeats six times — an extended drill on a single verb form. Abstract nouns (heaven, hell, peace) give a vocabulary stretch.

vocab_hooks.note: verb — imperative form starts every verse

grammar_callouts: it's easy if you try — zero conditional
above / below as prepositions of place

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "imagine" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "imagine" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Nothing to kill or die for

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You may say I'm a dreamer
No need for greed or hunger

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Imagine" was released in 1971. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Imagine" foi lançada em 1971. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md:
**Pedagogy:** Every verse opens with the imperative 'Imagine' — six reps in one song. Great for drilling. Abstract nouns push learners slightly beyond A1 comfort zone.

**Watch out:** 'Brotherhood of man' is dated language; discuss with students what more inclusive alternatives exist today.

lines: You may say I'm a dreamer
But I'm not the only one
I hope someday you'll join us
And the world will be as one
